summary: Closeout observations for the 2026-05-10 runtime refactor slices, integrated review plan, function-budget candidate resolution, release dry-run artifactization, and sealed authority preflight promotion gating.

observations.problem: Readiness now consumes release closeout summary, batch manifest, finality, and post-check finalizer evidence and blocks promotion correctly, but the current canonical evidence still has machine_release_allowed=false, release closeout batch status=fail, and post-check finalizer status=attention. Automated on 2026-05-11: batch manifest now emits `release_authority_vocabulary.blocker_reason_ids`, sealed rehearsal check emits `failure_details[].vocabulary_reason_id`, and readiness release-gate blockers preserve the same reason ids. Follow-up automated on 2026-05-11: sealed dry-run now emits `preflight_status=binding_pass_authority_blocked` when ZIP/distribution binding passes but release authority is blocked; `make release-authority-sealed-preflight` treats that as a successful typed preflight, CI uploads it as `release-authority-blocked-preflight-*`, and readiness diagnostics link `release_authority_preflight_summary` to the sealed rehearsal failure details. The current blocker ids are `machine_release_not_allowed`, `release_authority_not_clean_pass`, `sealed_release_not_clean_pass`, and `distribution_package_not_materialized`.
observations.why_it_matters: Auto-improve promotion must stay blocked until release authority and sealed distribution evidence are clean; otherwise a runnable mutation queue could bypass release closeout authority.
observations.automation_candidate: Implemented in auto_improve_readiness_runtime release-authority preflight promotion blockers and the learning-readiness vocabulary schema.
observations.suggested_followup: Closed as a runtime gate: auto-improve readiness now keeps can_execute_trial true but forces can_promote_result=false when sealed release-authority preflight evidence is missing or not clean. The blocker id is promotion_blocked_by_release_authority_preflight_failure with signal release_authority_preflight_not_clean. Promotion still requires make release-authority-sealed-preflight and make release-evidence-closeout-sealed-dry-run-check or the sealed release lane before rerunning readiness.
